changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.11
changeSet.comment: Create plans table mirroring SQLite plan_library schema with tenant_id
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.plans CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.11
changeSet.comment: Enable and force RLS; create tenant isolation policy
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE nexus.plans ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE nexus.plans FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
-- cmd=ALL: covers SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE in one policy. -- USING predicate: filters rows on reads (SELECT / UPDATE source / DELETE source). -- WITH CHECK predicate: validates rows on writes (INSERT / UPDATE target). -- current_setting('nexus.tenant', true): missing_ok=true so unset GUC returns NULL -- rather than raising an error. NULL != any tenant_id → zero rows match. -- This is the fail-closed default: an unstamped connection sees nothing. CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON nexus.plans USING (tenant_id = current_setting('nexus.tenant', true)) WITH CHECK (tenant_id = current_setting('nexus.tenant', true));

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.11
changeSet.comment: Add FTS generated tsvector column (parity contract rev 2) and GIN index
changeSet.sql:
-- Generated STORED column: auto-maintained on INSERT/UPDATE, no trigger needed. -- Weights per parity contract (docs/rdr/rdr-152-fts-parity-contract.md rev 2, Store 2): -- match_text 'A' config='english' (prose, stemmed, stopwords — hybrid dimensional form) -- tags 'B' config='simple' (identifier/CSV, no stemming, no stopwords) -- project 'C' config='simple' (identifier, no stemming, no stopwords) -- COALESCE: tags/project are default '' but defensive coalesce matches memory baseline pattern. ALTER TABLE nexus.plans ADD COLUMN fts_vector TSVECTOR GENERATED ALWAYS AS ( setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(match_text, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(tags, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(project, '')), 'C') ) STORED;
-- GIN index: accelerates @@ operator (plainto_tsquery). CREATE INDEX idx_plans_fts ON nexus.plans USING GIN (fts_vector);
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS nexus.idx_plans_fts; ALTER TABLE nexus.plans DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS fts_vector;
